nasb.text: May God do so to the enemies of David, and more also, if by morning I leave as much as one male of any who belong to him.”

esv.text: God do so to the enemies of David and more also, if by morning I leave so much as one male of all who belong to him.”

cnv.text: 如果我讓這人一切所有的，就是一個男丁，留到明天早晨，　神怎樣懲罰大衛的仇敵，願他也怎樣加倍懲罰我。”

ccb.text: 如果我让他家里一个男子活到明早，愿上帝重重地惩罚我！”
